title: Synaptic Four Technical Report Series
description: Version-controlled technical reports from Synaptic Four covering bioinformatics, GA4GH standards, FAIR data systems, and research infrastructure. Each GitHub Release is archived with a citable DOI.
notes: Enable GitHub integration at https://zenodo.org/account/settings/github/ and toggle ON for SynapticFour/technical-reports. See docs/zenodo-integration.md.
